radius.description: The radius of the wheel in meters. This is the radius of a circle in the local YZ plane.

suspensionStiffness.description: The stiffness of the suspension, the resistance to moving up or down.

suspensionTravel.description: The distance the suspension can move up or down in meters.

useForSteering.description: If true, the wheel should rotate to help the vehicle steer.

useForTraction.description: If true, the wheel transfers the engine force to the ground to propel the vehicle in its desired direction.

width.description: The width of the wheel in meters. This is the width of the wheel in the local X axis.
